'''Snowmice''' were small, rarely-seen, land-scavenging [[Rodent/Legends|rodents]] native to the icy wilderness of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].<ref name="GG3">''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
